title: Mini Rolling Pin, Kids Rolling Pins Wooden Handle Non-Stick Silicone Rolling Pins Pastry Brushes Dough Roller for Baking Pizza Cookie Pastry, 4 Pack (Red, Green, Orange, Blue)
features: 🥰【Silicone Roller】Food grade dough roller with non-stick silicone surface for rolling dough, making cooking and baking a breeze. Secure and sturdy handles ensure you'll be able to apply maximum pressure; Smooth surface, stain, and odor resistance. Keeps you and your family safe.

🥰【Easy to Clean】Super easy to clean up, when you finished baking, hand wash with warm soapy water and dry promptly, make sure that the silicone pin is completely dry before each use and before storage. Enjoy more time baking and less time cleaning!

🥰【Parent-Kid Activity Tool】Our silicone rolling pins are parent-kid interactive game tools. One for parents and another for kids. The rolling part is applied with a special design, smooth action, and easy to operate. Even a child can master it quickly.

🥰【Wide Application】Ideal for preparing biscuit dough, pizza bases, pie top, pastry, and more. And great for kids; Designed for KIDS to join kitchen. You can use the smaller one to teach the little ones just how much fun baking can be.

🥰【Complete Service】Our goal is always to provide the best service possible so that you can quickly deliver new products. If you have questions, please us in time. We will work to resolve all your issues. Your is our priority.
